'''vayojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whatdoyoucallit|whatdoyoucallit]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whatdoyoucallit|whatdoyoucallit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vayojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væyejeth|væyejeth]] || [[word:væyejej|væyejej]] || [[word:væyejesh|væyejesh]] || [[word:væyeje|væyeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vayoyojoth|vayoyojoth]] || [[word:vayoyojoj|vayoyojoj]] || [[word:vayoyojosh|vayoyojosh]] || [[word:vayoyojo|vayoyojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vayojoth|vayojoth]] || [[word:vayojoj|vayojoj]] || [[word:vayojosh|vayojosh]] || [[word:vayojo|vayojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vayofjoth|vayofjoth]] || [[word:vayofjoj|vayofjoj]] || [[word:vayofjosh|vayofjosh]] || [[word:vayofjof|vayofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vayojotho|vayojotho]] || [[word:vayojojo|vayojojo]] || [[word:vayojosho|vayojosho]] || [[word:vayojoko|vayojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vayojoth|vayojoth]] || [[word:vayojoj|vayojoj]] || [[word:vayojosh|vayojosh]] || [[word:vayojo|vayojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vayojothol|vayojothol]] || [[word:vayojojol|vayojojol]] || [[word:vayojoshol|vayojoshol]] || [[word:vayojokol|vayojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vayojothotho|vayojothotho]] || [[word:vayojojojo|vayojojojo]] || [[word:vayojoshosho|vayojoshosho]] || [[word:vayojoko|vayojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vayojothon|vayojothon]] || [[word:vayojojon|vayojojon]] || [[word:vayojoshon|vayojoshon]] || [[word:vayojokon|vayojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vayojothoro|vayojothoro]] || [[word:vayojojoro|vayojojoro]] || [[word:vayojoshoro|vayojoshoro]] || [[word:vayojokoro|vayojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
